name: Wetouch Technology Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Through our wholly-owned subsidiaries, we are engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, sales and servicing of medium- to large-sized projected capacitive touchscreens. We specialize in large-format touchscreens, which are developed and designed for a wide variety of markets and used in the financial terminals, automotive, Point of Sales, gaming, lottery, medical, Human-Machine Interface (HMI), and other specialized industries.
